title: POV: You're a Black Market Surgeon (You Never Get to Stop)
hook: You're a licensed surgeon until a malpractice board takes your name away in one afternoon. The only medicine still open to you afterward is cash-only, off the books — and it never lets you leave.
body: POV: you're a black market surgeon — a real trauma surgeon whose license is revoked after a malpractice case, and the only medicine still open to you afterward is cash-only and off the books. THE FALL: $180,000 a year, a hospital badge with your real name on it, gone to $0 in one afternoon after a permanent license revocation. THE FIRST CUT: $400 a night patching gunshot wounds nobody can report — real law (like New York's mandatory gunshot-wound reporting statute) is the exact mechanism that makes cash buy silence. THE REGULARS: $1,500 a night running unlicensed cosmetic injections ('pumping parties') — a real, documented practice where a reviewed case series puts lung-embolism mortality at roughly one in four. THE RETAINER: $5,000 a month on call for one crew. THE BROKER: $250,000 for a single kidney — the real, documented math of the organ trade, where a buyer pays roughly ten times what the trafficked or coerced donor actually receives (a 2017 Global Financial Integrity estimate puts the illegal organ trade at $840M-$1.7B a year). THE SYNDICATE'S DOCTOR: $1,000,000 a year, a private clinic, armed protection — and the one thing all that money can never buy back: the ability to ever leave. A dramatized cautionary POV — characters are fictional, the documented mechanics are real, never a how-to. Watch the whole series — every life, every level, every way the climb costs you. For educational and entertainment purposes.
pinned: Here's the part that stays with me: the real math of the organ trade is that the buyer pays roughly ten times what the actual donor — often trafficked or coerced — ever receives. The broker is the only one in that chain who profits like a doctor. Which level do you think a person can never actually come back from?
poll: Which level costs the most? THE FIRST CUT (the first off-book patient) / THE REGULARS (the pumping parties) / THE BROKER (the organ deal) / THE SYNDICATE'S DOCTOR (you can never leave)
